resources.string: With a scarlet color and combative nature, Red Pikmin are curious, highly adaptable, and completely fire-resistant, making them ideal for high-temperature environments.
With a yellow color and ears that enhance their agility, Yellow Pikmin can dig quickly, reach greater heights when thrown, and are completely immune to electricity.
With a blue body and serene appearance, Blue Pikmin breathe underwater thanks to their gills, allowing them to move easily in both aquatic and terrestrial ecosystems.
Robust and heavy, Purple Pikmin possess a strength ten times greater than other Pikmin, making them ideal for high-power tasks and stunning enemies upon impact.
Small and fast, White Pikmin are immune to poison and secrete toxins that harm enemies, making them a dangerous type if ingested.
With an extremely hard stone body, these Pikmin can break crystals and are immune to being crushed, thanks to their nature fused with stone.
Light and pink in color, Winged Pikmin can fly over obstacles and water, moving with great agility despite having low-damage attacks.
With a low-temperature core, Ice Pikmin continuously generate ice, able to freeze enemies and surfaces thanks to their frozen body.
With a bright green body, Glow Pikmin shine in the dark and can teleport, being especially useful in night missions.
